title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Retry
scenario: User can retry a fit test on a connected device after failing or canceling on the second screen and see the result.
steps: 1. Connect a device to the system.
2. Initiate a fit test on the connected device.
3. On the second screen of the fit test, either fail the test or cancel the process.
6. Observe the result of the retried fit test.
expected: The user should be able to tap the Retry button, perform the test again, and see the result.
